def negative_module_constant_rebound_after_public_import():
    rule_id = "module_constant_rebound_after_public_import"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag modules that expose apparent constants and later rebind them during normal runtime flow."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
